Wish.title: Wish
Wish.description: A thank you message or wish shared on the Tea Thank You tree.

sender.description: The name of the person who sent the message.

x.description: X coordinate percentage on the tree.

y.description: Y coordinate percentage on the tree.

color.description: Tailwind color class for the leaf.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the wish was created.

/wishes/{wishId}.description: Collection of all thank you messages shared by users.
